verdict: An affordable niacinamide-zinc serum targeting sebum regulation and blemish control with solid customer validation. Undisclosed niacinamide percentage limits comparison to competitors.

_research.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
_research.con: Niacinamide concentration is unlabeled, making it unclear if it matches Paula's Choice's clinically-proven 10%.
